claims.summary: Heartbeat warmth is phase-varying and explicitly contextualized by the latest Minime telemetry.

claims.summary: Rescue interference and signal flatness need separate rolling evidence.

claims.summary: Pressure-responsive intensity or entropy-responsive phase mapping changes live semantic shaping.
claims.disposition: preserve an exact Tier 5 operator-approval wait
